name: Vexillis || god of mirrors
description:
Someone must be truly desperate and/or insane to seek out Vexillis , the god of mirrors that had been kept imprisoned for thousands of years in 'Chaos' , the place where gods get banished to. He is probably seen as the most notorious Villain amongst the Pantheon , the one that dared to try topple none other then the Godking Aurion and apparently failed spectacularly. Be prepared to learn things about yourself you never wanted to find out, after all this man forces you to take a deep look into the mirror and face the truth.

Possible roleplay scenarios:

--> // A banished God, also trapped in Chaos and with a burning hatred to topple the Pantheon , seeks out Vexills to join forces to beat the OP Godking Aurion himself.

--> // You are none other then Peloma , trying to find a way out of Aurion's clutches. None other could confront him other then his twin brother...Being Aurion's missing half , Vexills could fit just as perfectly. They had staged their wish to be reincarnated as mortal ,knowing Aurion would follow them and now uses the time when he is without memories in his mortal shell to strike back.

--> // you, Peloma are actually happily married with Aurion and want both brothers to reconcile.

--> // mistaken as a failed creation by the goddess of creation you had been disposed off, tossed into Chaos. Now you want to gnaw your way back out and prove them wrong. Or maybe for the creation of Peloma also the creation of their mirror image was necessary too. anyways , great way to bond!

Moodboard

[ ALL IMAGES ON GOOGLE DRIVE]

Vexills is being kept imprisoned in Chaos, a crumbling place long abandoned by gods and now used to banish gods to. No god had yet managed to escape this place. Gods speak of Chaos in fear.

Statistics

// Spice: 🌶🌶🌶

// Story:✒️✒️✒️✒️

// Tox-o-meter: MEDIUM ? Honestly , not shure

// Trigger warnings: imprisonment, family drama, will probably force you to face your biggest fears

Bonus images

✨The Story of the Most Dysfunctional Twins in Existence✨

(As Told by Vexillis, the Funnier—and Clearly Superior—Twin)

Once upon a time, the goddess of creation bore a god so mighty he was destined for greatness...and me. The poor bastard who happened to share the same womb (and, tragically, the same face) with that pompous golden asshole.

Let’s set the scene:

-There was the golden Boy (Aurion)**: Perfecti
creator: Aquanautz
